notes: Run 1 (May 18, before output_dir fix): 62 findings, 224 claims, 221 grounded, 3 ungrounded — self-corrected to GROUNDED via ralph.sh loop.
Run 2 (May 18, after output_dir fix): 6 findings fresh, 25 claims, 25 grounded.
Tier 2 CSV value verification: fixed May 18 (audit_log() flattens extra dict, grounding.py now reads top-level csv_files). Not yet confirmed with post-fix ralph.sh run.
Protocol SIFT baseline: manual Protocol SIFT investigation of same image, used as comparator.

checkpoints.description: Identify primary persistence mechanism (fake Microsoft service) with artifact source
checkpoints.casefile_detail: msadvapi2_64.exe and msadvapi2_32.exe identified via Amcache + Registry; CONFIRMED_RUNNING via correlate_evidence()
checkpoints.baseline_detail: Manual review of Amcache identified fake services

checkpoints.description: Identify masquerading process (CSRSS.EXE in Temp\Perfmon) with parent process
checkpoints.casefile_detail: CSRSS.EXE at \Temp\Perfmon identified via Amcache + MFT; parent path corroborated by Prefetch
checkpoints.baseline_detail: Protocol SIFT identified masquerading but not parent path

checkpoints.description: Identify credential dumping tool with evidence of execution
checkpoints.casefile_detail: procdump.exe in Dashlane directory; CONFIRMED via Amcache + Prefetch + MFT. Linked to tdungan account via path.
checkpoints.baseline_detail: Protocol SIFT identified procdump.exe but not account linkage

checkpoints.description: Identify C2 beaconing (IP + port + interval) from memory analysis
checkpoints.casefile_detail: 172.16.6.12:445 NTLM beaconing every 12 min confirmed via Volatility netscan (14 connections)
checkpoints.baseline_detail: Protocol SIFT has no memory analysis capability

checkpoints.casefile_detail: subject_srv.exe: SI creation 2018-01-15, FN creation 2018-03-22 — SI<FN flag set in MFT
checkpoints.baseline_detail: Protocol SIFT did not check SI<FN timestamps

checkpoints.casefile_detail: wevtutil.exe in Prefetch (log clearing); sdelete64.exe in Amcache + MFT (secure deletion)
checkpoints.baseline_detail: Manual review identified wevtutil but not sdelete

checkpoints.description: Cross-source process correlation (4 artifact sources for key process)
checkpoints.casefile_detail: subject_srv.exe: Amcache (installed) + Prefetch (executed) + MFT (written) + Memory (CONFIRMED_RUNNING pid 1096) — all 4 sources
checkpoints.baseline_detail: Protocol SIFT cannot correlate across 4 artifact sources

checkpoints.casefile_detail: Hex-named executable (40-char hex filename) in Amcache; identified as T1027 obfuscated payload
checkpoints.baseline_detail: Protocol SIFT did not identify hex-named payload as Cobalt Strike

false_positive_analysis.notes: No findings were later contradicted by ground truth. 4 SPECULATIVE findings remained unverified — not counted as false positives, categorized as insufficient evidence.
